## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Outreach and GrowthX teams to discuss SEO performance, content strategy, and ongoing collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/LtzstXcQcs5xD6pYgJS_6goWTtg3CLZg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [September saw a decline in overall site performance, but recent week-over-week data shows signs of recovery and stabilization](https://fathom.video/share/LtzstXcQcs5xD6pYgJS_6goWTtg3CLZg?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [LLM visibility and traffic continue to trend upward, with significant gains across most models](https://fathom.video/share/LtzstXcQcs5xD6pYgJS_6goWTtg3CLZg?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [New 2026-focused content ideas presented for Outreach team review and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/LtzstXcQcs5xD6pYgJS_6goWTtg3CLZg?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Brand terminology update: "AI revenue workflow platform" now preferred over "sales execution platform"](https://fathom.video/share/LtzstXcQcs5xD6pYgJS_6goWTtg3CLZg?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [September: Significant drop in clicks and impressions, aligning with industry-wide trends](https://fathom.video/share/LtzstXcQcs5xD6pYgJS_6goWTtg3CLZg?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Recent week-over-week data:](https://fathom.video/share/LtzstXcQcs5xD6pYgJS_6goWTtg3CLZg?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
      - [Impressions rebounded to 761k (+20k from previous week)](https://fathom.video/share/LtzstXcQcs5xD6pYgJS_6goWTtg3CLZg?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [9-position climb in average position over 3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/LtzstXcQcs5xD6pYgJS_6goWTtg3CLZg?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
      - [CTR holding consistent despite impression fluctuations](https://fathom.video/share/LtzstXcQcs5xD6pYgJS_6goWTtg3CLZg?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Blog traffic grew significantly week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/LtzstXcQcs5xD6pYgJS_6goWTtg3CLZg?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Top performing blog page: Sales email template (refreshed Sept 8) showing strong results](https://fathom.video/share/LtzstXcQcs5xD6pYgJS_6goWTtg3CLZg?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)

### LLM Visibility and Traffic

  - [Overall upward trend in LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/LtzstXcQcs5xD6pYgJS_6goWTtg3CLZg?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
  - [ChatGPT showing increased visibility and click-throughs](https://fathom.video/share/LtzstXcQcs5xD6pYgJS_6goWTtg3CLZg?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [All models except Gemini saw week-over-week increases](https://fathom.video/share/LtzstXcQcs5xD6pYgJS_6goWTtg3CLZg?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Top LLM traffic landing pages:](https://fathom.video/share/LtzstXcQcs5xD6pYgJS_6goWTtg3CLZg?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
      - [Homepage](https://fathom.video/share/LtzstXcQcs5xD6pYgJS_6goWTtg3CLZg?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
      - [Working at Outreach/careers pages](https://fathom.video/share/LtzstXcQcs5xD6pYgJS_6goWTtg3CLZg?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
      - [Pricing information](https://fathom.video/share/LtzstXcQcs5xD6pYgJS_6goWTtg3CLZg?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)

### Content Strategy and Planning

  - [New content ideas presented focusing on:](https://fathom.video/share/LtzstXcQcs5xD6pYgJS_6goWTtg3CLZg?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
      - [Market intelligence and thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/LtzstXcQcs5xD6pYgJS_6goWTtg3CLZg?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
      - [Customer success and revenue expansion](https://fathom.video/share/LtzstXcQcs5xD6pYgJS_6goWTtg3CLZg?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Shift to 2026-focused predictions (from 2025)](https://fathom.video/share/LtzstXcQcs5xD6pYgJS_6goWTtg3CLZg?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Outreach team to review and provide feedback within the next week](https://fathom.video/share/LtzstXcQcs5xD6pYgJS_6goWTtg3CLZg?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
